name: sp-ark-operations
description: Onboard new sp-ARK Labs members end-to-end: read BossHub inquiries, provision Verkada building access, and create Nexudus member accounts.
long_description: Provides the /new-member-onboarding skill for sp-ARK Labs operators. Connects to BossHub/LeadConnector to read pending member inquiry form submissions, Verkada to create building access users and assign them to the All Access group, and Nexudus to create member portal accounts with the correct membership plan.

tools.name: bosshub_list_member_inquiries
tools.description: List new member inquiry form submissions from the BossHub/LeadConnector form

tools.name: bosshub_get_member_inquiry
tools.description: Find one member inquiry submission by submission ID, email, or name

tools.name: verkada_find_access_user
tools.description: Find a Verkada access user by email address

tools.name: verkada_create_access_user
tools.description: Create a new Verkada building access user

tools.name: verkada_add_user_to_access_group
tools.description: Add a Verkada user to an access group

tools.name: nexudus_find_person
tools.description: Find a Nexudus coworker/member by email address

tools.name: nexudus_create_person
tools.description: Create a Nexudus member account with a membership plan

tools.name: nexudus_assign_booking_access
tools.description: Assign a different plan to an existing Nexudus coworker

bosshub_access_token.title: BossHub Access Token
bosshub_access_token.description: API token for BossHub / LeadConnector (requires forms.readonly scope)

verkada_api_key.title: Verkada API Key
verkada_api_key.description: API key for Verkada access control

nexudus_access_token.title: Nexudus Access Token
nexudus_access_token.description: Bearer token for the Nexudus member portal API
